brAIn-perception.description: Voice, gaze and intent perception nodes.

nodes.name: voice
nodes.description: Local STT (faster-whisper) + speaker diarization (WeSpeaker). Spawns its own Python server as a child process.

nodes.name: gaze
nodes.description: Face detection (InsightFace) + gaze direction (Gazelle) + scene description (Moondream). Spawns its own Python server as a child process.

nodes.name: intent
nodes.description: Pure-TS correlator over voice.transcript + gaze.target.resolved bus events. Maintains persons (voice ↔ gaze ↔ name) in local SQLite, publishes intent.detected.
